video_subject: A middle-aged Indian woman in a vibrant saffron saree performing a morning Surya Namaskar on a sun-drenched balcony. Her movements are fluid and disciplined, capturing the grace of the yoga sequence in 8 seconds.
motion_dynamics: Slow, meditative transition from a standing prayer pose to a full upward-facing dog; soft focus on the dust motes dancing in the golden morning light.
temporal_storyboard: 0s: Subject stands with palms together, eyes closed, in a serene morning light.
4s: She gracefully transitions into an arched backbend, her saree catching the breeze.
8s: She completes the movement in a low cobra pose, looking towards the rising sun.
visual_style: High-end cinematic documentary style. Warm golden-hour lighting, high dynamic range, 8K resolution, slight film grain for a nostalgic feel.
negative_prompt: shaky camera, low framerate, flickering, distorted faces, text, watermarks, morphing artifacts, generic CGI, flat lighting.
